use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF SYMPTOMS ASSOCIATED WITH SEASONAL AND PERENNIAL ALLERGIC RHINITIS IN ADULTS AND ADOLESCENTS 12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER. PATENT CLAIMS METHODS FOR TREATING A RESPIRATORY DISEASE IN A CHILD

indications.text:
ZETONNA Nasal Aerosol is a corticosteroid indicated for treatment of • Potential worsening of existing tuberculosis; fungal, bacterial, viral, or
symptoms associated with seasonal and perennial allergic rhinitis in adults and parasitic infections; or ocular herpes simplex. More serious or even fatal...

ZETONNA Nasal Aerosol is a corticosteroid indicated for treatment of • Potential worsening of existing tuberculosis; fungal, bacterial, viral, or
symptoms associated with seasonal and perennial allergic rhinitis in adults and parasitic infections; or ocular herpes simplex. More serious or even fatal...

1.1 Treatment of Seasonal Allergic Rhinitis
ZETONNA (ciclesonide) is indicated for the treatment of symptoms associated with seasonal
allergic rhinitis in adult and pediatric patients 12 years of age and older.
1.2 Treatment of Perennial Allergic Rhinitis
